_comment: EXAMPLE config for the XEMM live dashboard. Copy to config.json and fill in your own VPS / trading-repo details. config.json is gitignored, so your real host/IP/paths never get committed.

vps._comment: SSH target for the host running the native xemm_eval binary (read-only probes).

_root_comment: Path to the trading repo (holds scripts/trade_stats.py + aster.env + hyperliquid.env). Default '..' = the parent of this dashboard folder.

chart._comment: The market shown on the main price chart. coin = HL coin, symbol = Aster symbol.
chart._tick_db_comment: SQLite archive of every 1s mid (table ticks: ts INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, aster REAL, hl REAL). Exchanges only serve 1-minute candles historically, so this is the durable record for rebuilding a high-resolution chart later — queryable by time range.
chart._resolution_comment: Chart resolution per zoom window: full 1s when short, coarser when wide. First bucket whose max_minutes >= the requested window wins (widest applies beyond the last).

refresh._comment: Background refresh cadences (seconds). The browser polls /api/state every `ui_poll_s`.
